enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Resource Raising Norms) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to the All India Financial Institutions (AIFIs)
regulated by the Reserve Bank, viz., the Export-Import Bank of India (EXIM Bank),
the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD), the National
Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (NaBFID), the National
Housing Bank (NHB), and the Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI).
enriched_requirements.object: All India Financial Institutions (AIFIs) regulated by the Reserve Bank, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, an AIFI shall continue to adhere to the UL.
enriched_requirements.object: the UL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate borrowings under the UL shall not at any time exceed 100 per cent
of the NOF of an AIFI as per its latest audited balance sheet, or as approved by
the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: 100 per cent of the NOF of an AIFI as per its latest audited balance sheet, or as approved by the RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The UL shall consist of borrowings through four specified instruments, viz., term
deposits (TDs), term money borrowings, certificates of deposits (CDs), and
commercial papers (CPs).
enriched_requirements.object: four specified instruments, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms and conditions relating to resource
mobilization by an AIFI through the various instruments shall be governed by the
norms prescribed in this Chapter.
enriched_requirements.object: norms prescribed in this Chapter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be permitted to raise TDs for a maturity period of not less than one
year and not exceeding five years.
enriched_requirements.object: TDs for a maturity period of not less than one year and not exceeding five years

conditions: Provided that the TDs shall be of a minimum denomination of ₹10
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that the TDs shall be of a minimum denomination of ₹10,000.
enriched_requirements.object: denomination of ₹10,000

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the AIFI shall not pay brokerage exceeding one per cent of
the deposits accepted.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the deposits accepted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall not allow premature withdrawal of TDs before completion of one year.
enriched_requirements.object: TDs before completion of one year

conditions: in case of death of the depositor
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that premature withdrawal of TDs before completion of one year shall be
permitted in case of death of the depositor, medical exigencies, educational
expenditure, and other such reasons, as approved by the Board of the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: of death of the depositor, medical exigencies, educational expenditure, and other such reasons, as approved by the Board of the A

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall have the freedom to fix its own penal rate of interest on premature
withdrawal of deposits.
enriched_requirements.object: fix its own penal rate of interest on premature withdrawal of deposits

conditions:
where premature withdrawal has been made before
completion of six months
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Provided that for deposits where premature withdrawal has been made before
completion of six months, no interest shall be payable to the depositor.
enriched_requirements.object: depositor

conditions:
where premature withdrawal has been made on
the date of or after completion of six months and before completion of one year
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that for deposits where premature withdrawal has been made on
the date of or after completion of six months and before completion of one year,
interest shall be payable at the rate of average of the minimum and maximum
saving deposit rates as published in the Weekly Statistical Supplement (WSS) to
the monthly RBI Bulletin.
enriched_requirements.object: rate of average of the minimum and maximum saving deposit rates as published in the Weekly Statistical Supplement (WSS) to the month

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall mandatorily have its TDs rated from a SEBI-approved Credit Rating
Agency.
enriched_requirements.object: rated from a SEBI-approved Credit Rating Agency

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall not be permitted to provide loans against the TDs accepted, unless
specifically permitted by the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: loans against the TDs accepted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be permitted to borrow through term money for a maturity period of
not less than three months and not exceeding six months.
enriched_requirements.object: through term money for a maturity period of not less than three months and not exceeding six months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall be free to fix the interest rates payable on the term money borrowings.
enriched_requirements.object: the interest rates payable on the term money borrowings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be permitted to borrow term money only from scheduled commercial
banks and co-operative banks.
enriched_requirements.object: term money only from scheduled commercial banks and co-operative banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CDs shall be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository
registered with SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall be permitted to issue CDs to all persons resident in India.
enriched_requirements.object: CDs to all persons resident in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CDs shall be issued in a minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5
lakh thereafter.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The tenor of a CD at issuance shall not be less than one year and shall not exceed
three years.
enriched_requirements.object: year and shall not exceed three years

conditions:
Provided that the AIFI shall not be permitted to buy back its own CDs before
maturity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI shall not be permitted to buy back its own CDs before
maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: back its own CDs before maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided further that there shall be no grace period for repayment of CDs.
enriched_requirements.object: for repayment of CDs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that no loans shall be sanctioned by an AIFI against its CDs,
unless specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: AIFI against its CDs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CDs shall be issued on a T+1 basis where T represents the date of closure of the
offer period for issuance of the CDs.
enriched_requirements.object: T+1 basis where T represents the date of closure of the offer period for issuance of the CDs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall be permitted to issue CDs at a discount to face value.
enriched_requirements.object: CDs at a discount to face value

conditions: Provided that CDs shall be permitted to be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that CDs shall be permitted to be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis.
enriched_requirements.object: issued on a fixed / floating rate basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the interest rate on the floating rate CDs shall be reset at
periodic rests agreed to at the time of issue and shall be linked to a benchmark
published by a Financial Benchmark Administrator, as authorised by Reserve
Bank, or approved by the FIMMDA for this purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: rests agreed to at the time of issue and shall be linked to a benchmark published by a Financial Benchmark Administrator, as auth

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that FIMMDA shall ensure that any floating rate approved by them
for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively, and in arm's length
transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively, and in arm's length transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the secondary market, CDs shall be traded either in Over the Counter (OTC)
markets, including on Electronic Trading Platforms, or on recognised stock
exchanges with approval of the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: Over the Counter (OTC) markets, including on Electronic Trading Platforms, or on recognised stock exchanges with approval of the R

conditions: Provided that the settlement cycle for OTC trades in CDs shall be T+0 or T+1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that the settlement cycle for OTC trades in CDs shall be T+0 or T+1.

Provided further that all secondary market transactions in CDs shall be settled on
a Delivery versus Payment (DvP) basis through the clearing corporation of any
recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved by the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: Delivery versus Payment (DvP) basis through the clearing corporation of any recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting requirements
(1) Details of primary issuance of a CD shall be reported by the issuer to the Trade
Repository (TR) of the Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: issuer to the Trade Repository (TR) of the Clearing Corporation of India Ltd

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All secondary market transactions executed in the OTC market and / or on
recognised stock exchanges in CDs shall be reported, with time stamp, within 15
minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the TR by each
counterparty to the transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: stamp, within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the TR by each counterparty to the transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be governed by the instructions contained in Master Direction -
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of
original or initial maturity upto one year) Directions, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions contained in Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be permitted to raise resources by way of issue of bonds, either by
public issue or through private placement, without the prior approval of the RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: resources by way of issue of bonds, either by public issue or through private placement, without the prior approval of the RBI

conditions: Provided that the minimum maturity of the bond at issuance shall be 3 years
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that the minimum maturity of the bond at issuance shall be 3 years.

Provided further that the interest / coupon payable to the investors shall be
permitted to be either at a fixed rate or at a floating rate referenced to a market
determined benchmark rate.
enriched_requirements.object: either at a fixed rate or at a floating rate referenced to a market determined benchmark rate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that no call or put or exit options (by whatever name called) on the
bonds shall be exercisable before the expiry of one year from the date of issue of
the bonds
enriched_requirements.object: expiry of one year from the date of issue of the bonds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure to comply with the provisions of any directions, regulations, or
guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicable, in
respect of issue of all the above-mentioned instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: the provisions of any directions, regulations, or guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicab

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed instructions or guidelines shall continue to be governed
by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially
affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
